eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Llano, TX; at 08:33 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 09:33 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Llano County This is a TEST of the Llano County Emergency Alert System.  No action is required.  This is only a test.
